title: Multiple Email Signature
excerpt:

posts.author: KylenHunt (Kylen Hunt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,
As an entrepreneur running multiple companies, it would be great if we could change our email signatures. Currently I’m running two different businesses and work on one in the mornings and the other in the afternoons. Having the options to send all emails from Monday would be awesome if there was the option to change signatures when needed.
I’m a new user to Monday so if this option exists, I have not yet learned how it works.
Thanks for your consider in this feature.
Make it an awesome day!
Kylen

posts.author: ajduf (ajduf)
posts.cookedHtml: Did this happen? I have the same issue

posts.author: infofta (Admin Info)
posts.cookedHtml: We need this feature desperately. It is frustrating because when you send an email you have the option to change who the email is being sent by but it all uses one email siganture. Very surprised this has not been implemented coming up to 2025.

posts.author: cfriedenberger (Cassandera Friedenberger)
posts.cookedHtml: This is something that my organization would benefit from greatly! I can’t believe this isn’t available, especially since you can give other people access to use your email for outreach.
